---
title: "Helen Long"
pagetitle: "Helen Long"
first-name: "Helen"
last-name: "Long"
credentials: "PhD, CCC-SLP"
position: "Assistant Professor"
affiliation: "Case Western Reserve University"
pronouns: "she/her"
orcid: "0000-0001-6406-1222"
date-joined: "2020-05-01"
order: 2
categories:
  - "Collaborator"
  - "Vice-Chair & Secretary"
description-research: "Helen Long is a speech-language pathologist and Assistant Professor at Case Western Reserve University. Her research aims to improve care pathways targeting early identification and intervention of communication disabilities in infants and toddlers with motor disorders like cerebral palsy to support early interaction with caregivers and long-term participation."
description-os: "Dr. Long is an advocate of free and public access to scientific manuscripts for clinicians and scientists, and is dedicated to advancing knowledge on how to share and access research."
link: "http://caslabs.case.edu/commspeech/"
website-button: "Visit Dr. Long's Lab Website!"
headshot: "../_headshots/helen_long.jpg"
lightbox: false
draft: false
layout: article
title-block-categories: false
editor: source
---

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![{{< meta title >}}, {{< meta credentials >}}<br>{{< meta position >}}<br>{{< meta affiliation >}}](../_headshots/helen_long.jpg)
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
{{< meta description-research >}}

{{< meta description-os >}}

[{{< meta website-button>}}]({{< meta link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}\
\
:::
::::::
